news.summary: The Parisians head to Anfield for the second leg of their Champions League quarter-final against Liverpool. After a 2–0 first-leg win, the Paris club arrive with a strong advantage and are targeting a place in the Champions League semi-finals.

news.headline: Founder of China's Evergrande pleads guilty to fraud
news.summary: Evergrande was once China's biggest real estate firm, with a stock market valuation of more than $50bn.

news.headline: Indonesia, US sign ‘major’ defence cooperation agreement
news.summary: Signing of defence partnership follows reports that US is seeking overflight access in Indonesia for military planes.

news.headline: Mark Carney secures majority government in Canada after special election win
news.summary: <p>Carney’s Liberals will now be able to pass legislation without the support of opposition parties – and govern until 2029</p><p>The Canadian prime minister, Mark Carney, has secured a parliamentary majority for his Liberal government, CBC News reported. The victory will help him

news.headline: Greek police using masked migrants to forcibly push other migrants back across border
news.summary: Mercenaries recruited since at least 2020 for illegal migrant ‘pushbacks’ in Greece, BBC told

news.headline: Three babies born into Sudan war every minute, charity warns
news.summary: Sudanese children are being born into conditions 'no child should ever face', Save the Children says.

news.headline: Pakistan launches medical tourism initiative under Special Investment Facilitation Council
news.summary:
<p>ISLAMABAD: The Pakistan National Medical Tourism Initiative, under the Special Investment Facilitation Council (SIFC), has been formally launched.</p>
<p>The development was announced during the 30th Annual International Conference of the Pakistan Association of Plastic Surgeons

news.headline: Man charged with attempted murder of OpenAI CEO Sam Altman
news.summary: A man has been charged with attempted murder for hurling a Molotov cocktail at the home of OpenAI CEO Sam Altman.
